series_metadata.series_description: All records which documents are the basis for a payroll (e.g., report; activity sheets; time cards; overtime; compensation time; flextime authorization; sign-in sheets; OHP 0166, HP-29 OSHP Duty Assignment, bid schedules).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: audit has been conducted. Once audit results have been received from State Auditors Office, notification will be sent as which dates are be destroyed. ; Paper: audit has been conducted. Once audit results have been received from State Auditors Office, notification will be sent as which dates are be destroyed
